productDisplayName: Puma Men Aquil Black Sports Shoes
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma shoes are the right solution for brand conscious Sports junkies. UpperMesh upper with synthetic and suede overlaysSynthetic twill tape laces in dual tonesOutsole reinforced onto the toe to act as a toe guardFormstripe on the sideComfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable FitTextile lining for added comfortMidsoleLightweight midsoleOutsoleMade of high traction rubber and has a scooped midfootMultidirectional lugs, suction points and flex grooves on the outsoleshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
